message:
Request token with access to news repository

The app token needs explicit repository scope for tenzir/news to
trigger workflows there.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_AUTOBUMPER_APP_ID }}
           private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_AUTOBUMPER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+          repositories: news
 
       - name: Trigger sync workflow
         uses: tenzir/news/.github/actions/sync@main
